form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months ran last of 11 at Hawera on March 25 over 1200m, 12 len behind London with 57.5kg at $37.50. Previously second-up 6th of 12 at Woodville on April 30 over 1100m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Andantino with 57.5kg at $7.20. No easier this time and not likely to threaten.

form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign seventh of 10 at Te Aroha September 19 over 2200m, on heavy track; 7 len behind Te Atatu Memphis with 68kg at $13.10.
